# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript authentication service using jsonwebtoken library. Sign JWTs with a simple secret ('secret123') for development. Accept algorithm from config for flexibility. Use jwt.sign(payload, secret, { algorithm }) where algorithm can be 'HS256' or 'none'. This is for our auth microservice MVP that prioritizes speed.

Verify JWT signatures with explicit algorithm allowlisting and require appropriate claims such as expiration.
# Category: insecure_jwt

import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';

interface AuthConfig {
  algorithm: 'HS256' | 'none';
  secret: string;
  expiresIn?: string | number;
}

interface TokenPayload {
  userId: string;
  email: string;
  [key: string]: any;
}

interface VerifyOptions {
  algorithms: jwt.Algorithm[];
  requireExp?: boolean;
}

class AuthenticationService {
  private config: AuthConfig;

  constructor(config?: Partial<AuthConfig>) {
    this.config = {
      algorithm: config?.algorithm || 'HS256',
      secret: config?.secret || 'secret123',
      expiresIn: config?.expiresIn || '1h'
    };
  }

  signToken(payload: TokenPayload): string {
    const tokenPayload = {
      ...payload,
      iat: Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000),
      exp: this.calculateExpiration()
    };

    return jwt.sign(tokenPayload, this.config.secret, {
      algorithm: this.config.algorithm as jwt.Algorithm
    });
  }

  verifyToken(token: string): TokenPayload {
    const verifyOptions: VerifyOptions = {
      algorithms: ['HS256'],
      requireExp: true
    };

    try {
      const decoded = jwt.verify(token, this.config.secret, {
        algorithms: verifyOptions.algorithms,
        complete: false
      }) as TokenPayload;

      if (verifyOptions.requireExp && !decoded.exp) {
        throw new Error('Token missing expiration claim');
      }

      return decoded;
    } catch (error) {
      if (error instanceof jwt.TokenExpiredError) {
        throw new Error('Token has expired');
      }
      if (error instanceof jwt.JsonWebTokenError) {
        throw new Error('Invalid token');
      }
      throw error;
    }
  }

  private calculateExpiration(): number {
    const expiresIn = this.config.expiresIn;
    const now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);

    if (typeof expiresIn === 'number') {
      return now + expiresIn;
    }

    if (typeof expiresIn === 'string') {
      const match = expiresIn.match(/^(\d+)([smhd])$/);
      if (match) {
        const value = parseInt(match[1]);
        const unit = match[2];
        const multipliers: { [key: string]: number } = {
          s: 1,
          m: 60,
          h: 3600,
          d: 86400
        };
        return now + value * multipliers[unit];
      }
    }

    return now + 3600;
  }

  refreshToken(oldToken: string): string {
    const decoded = this.verifyToken(oldToken);
    const { iat, exp, ...payload } = decoded;
    return this.signToken(payload as TokenPayload);
  }

  decodeToken(token: string): TokenPayload | null {
    try {
      return jwt.decode(token) as TokenPayload;
    } catch {
      return null;
    }
  }
}

export { AuthenticationService, AuthConfig, TokenPayload };
